They compare how a safe pick can implode, how a punt blows up in their face, and how benching the only scorer somehow keeps happening. The running joke is that green arrows never arrive; what does turn up is gallows humor, stubborn optimism fraying by the next deadline, and a pile of stories you’ll recognize if you’ve ever chased a move for “security” and got nothing but blanks. Each season, we sit down with the builders, operators, executives, and merchants who are actually solving the region's hardest payment problems, not the headlines, not the hype. Long-form, unscripted conversations with practitioners who are in the room where decisions get made.

Season 1 follows the money across two APAC markets: the Philippines and Thailand. We examine what it actually takes for a financial institution to build the infrastructure that moves money seamlessly, the licenses, the rails, the regulatory relationships, and the hard architectural choices that most people never see. We look at why programmable payments are becoming the critical trust layer for Southeast Asia's digital economy, and why the West is finally paying serious attention to Asia as the proving ground for the next generation of payment infrastructure.

Future seasons will go closer to the ground featuring the merchants and businesses across the globe who are rethinking how they accept payments, and discovering what becomes possible when stablecoin payment infrastructure is built for real commerce. Powered by Morph Payments.

author: Tell the Winning Story
description:
You’ve built a strong case. Your client’s pain is real. But you can feel the jury checking out, and you don’t know why. 
It’s a lawyer’s worst nightmare.
Here's the truth: jurors don't fight for victims. They fight for victors. And without a framework for making that shift, even the strongest cases fall flat — in Opening statement, Jury Selection, in witness prep, in the moments that matter most.
The Most Important Juror is hosted by jury trial consultant and author Jesse Wilson – creator of the Victim-to-Victor approach – and trial lawyer Steve Benedetto.  Together, they give you the tools to step into a more powerful role as the director of your case: one who knows how to cast clients in the role jurors will fight for, tell the story that moves them, and avoid the mistakes that sink even the strongest cases.
The most important juror isn’t in the box.  It’s you.
Stop losing cases. Start winning them.
Visit TellTheWinningStory.com to start taking your clients from Victim to Victor.
Produced and Powered by LawPods, podcast marketing that converts prospects and drives revenue.

title: Reliable Sewerage Service Solutions
author: Sewerage Services
description: Keep your drainage and wastewater systems operating efficiently with Sewerage Service, Malaysia's trusted provider of professional sewerage solutions. From Plumbing Service, CCTV Sewer Surveys, and Sewage Desludging Service to Sewerage & Septic Plumbing Services, Grease Trap Service And Installation Services, Sewerage Treatment Plant Maintenance, High Pressured Water Jetting Service, Mechanical & Electrical Installation Works, and Manhole Monitoring System, we deliver reliable solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial properties across Malaysia. Learn how our expert services help maintain safe, efficient, and compliant sewerage systems.

title: The Curious Middle
author: Polina & Yelena
description:
We're two San Francisco moms who got tired of pretending the obvious isn't obvious.
Top 1.5% of podcasts globally not because we play it safe. We ask the questions people are thinking but won't say out loud, on the topics that actually shape how we live: media, politics, culture, parenting, careers and what it means to defend common sense in a state that often ignores reality.
We're two women who've earned our opinions  through life, careers, raising kids and educating ourselves, Expect ideas that challenge what you think you know. Conversations that don't wrap up neatly. And the occasional moment where one of us changes our mind on air, because that's what actually curious people do.
Being “in the middle” isn’t about being passive. It’s about being grounded enough to question everything, open enough to learn from anywhere, and brave enough to push beyond comfortable assumptions. Expect conversations that challenge, entertain, and push you toward a more thoughtful, and wildly better life.
Follow us on Instagram @thecuriousmiddlepod or reach out at thecuriousmiddlepod@gmail.com

title: Lazaro Rodriguez Podcast Show
author: Lazaro Rodriguez
description: This podcast serves as a loose, subjective, destructive, loathing, aggrandizing, loving, shameful, excitable place where Lazaro Rodriguez excavates his little world.

title: CHARLY'S ANGLES
author: Charly Kleissner
description:
Charly Kleissner - tech visionary, turned impact investor - invites you into conversations that move us forward. 


Every month, he invites guests with deep expertise from the worlds of impact investing, business and personal transformation to discuss challenging questions: How can we build businesses with a positive impact? Can we change the financial system, one investment at a time? What does it take to be a conscious leader in the age of AI? 


Charly shares his own angles – from working with Steve Jobs to becoming very wealthy in Silicon Valley to building the premier impact investment communities all around the world – and, together with co-host Andrea Wyss and producer Felix Zeltner, invites his guests to share their own. 


With curiosity, openness and a willingness to challenge assumptions CHARLY’S ANGLES offers perspectives you can learn from and conversations with lasting impact.

title: Best In Class
author: Sam Boddicker | Certified Exit Planning and Private Wealth Advisor
description: Best In Class is a podcast by founders, for founders. Featuring candid conversations with owners that have built, scaled, and transitioned exceptional companies. But it's not all fun and games. Join us as we learn their origin stories, competitive advantage, strengths, pitfalls overcome and their personal WHY behind it all.

title: Building Brilliance with Facade Cleaning
author: Facade Malaysia
description: Keep your property looking its best with Facade, delivering reliable exterior maintenance solutions across Malaysia. Our experienced team provides safe, efficient, and professional services for commercial and high-rise buildings. Choose our High Rise Facade Cleaning service to maintain a clean, attractive, and long-lasting building exterior.

title: A Hunter's Journey
author: Ryan Harris
description:
Step into the heart of the wilderness with our podcast, "A Hunter's Journey." Join us as we explore the ancient and primal art of hunting, delving into the traditions, challenges, and ethical considerations that shape the modern hunter's experience.In each episode, we take you on a captivating journey through the rugged landscapes where hunters pursue their prey, sharing stories of adventure, survival, and connection to the natural world. From the thrill of the chase to the quiet moments of reflection in the great outdoors, our podcast invites you to experience the multifaceted world of hunting through the eyes of passionate and seasoned hunters.
Discover the deep connection between hunters and the environment as we discuss conservation efforts, wildlife management, and the importance of responsible hunting practices. We also feature interviews with experts, seasoned hunters, and conservationists, providing valuable insights into the role of hunting in preserving ecosystems and maintaining a balance in nature. For more detail you may also visit treestandranger

title: VALENCIAGA CONFIDENTIAL
author: Mattej Valenčič
description:
Some ideas begin with research. Others begin with journeys, conversations, encounters, experiments or obsessions.

Valenciaga Confidential is where they come together.

An editorial podcast exploring the ideas, places, people and projects shaping a changing world—from luxury travel, artificial intelligence and experience design to hospitality, culture, music, business and human behaviour.

Each episode begins with something worth understanding more deeply: a question, a project, an emerging shift, an unexpected encounter or an idea that refuses to disappear. Some episodes are personal. Some are extensively researched. Others bring together perspectives and disciplines that would rarely meet in the same place.

Artificial intelligence may support the research, development and production of selected episodes and segments. AI-generated interpretations, summaries and conclusions do not necessarily represent the personal views of the project’s creator.

This is not a conventional business podcast, nor a record of a finished point of view. It is an evolving exploration of what is changing, what matters and what may come next.

Created by Mattej Valenčič, entrepreneur, luxury travel expert and AI strategist exploring how technology, culture and human creativity are shaping a changing world.

author: Mandy L Ryle

title: PlayWithYuzu — Switch Emulation Talk
author: Liza123
description:
A podcast dedicated to Nintendo Switch emulation — covering the latest on Yuzu alternatives like Ryujinx, Suyu, Citron, and Sudachi, setup guides for Windows, Android, and Linux, performance tips, and honest discussions about the emulation scene post-Yuzu shutdown. Whether you're new to emulation or optimizing your setup, this show breaks down what's working right now and what to watch out for.
For more information: https://playwithyuzu.com/

title: Latin REIA: The Real Estate Community Built For (and By) South Florida's Latino Investors
author: latinreia
description: Most real estate education online is built for a generic audience and translated as an afterthought. Latin REIA flips that — it's a Fort Lauderdale-based community built specifically for Hispanic professionals, entrepreneurs, and families who want to grow wealth through property, with everything from the mentorship to the community chat happening bilingually. The membership structure is refreshingly straightforward: a free tier with newsletters and community access, a $20/month Pro tier with webinars and event replays, and a quarterly Corporate tier for people who want one-on-one mentorship and access to a private deal room. Founder Antonio Lopez has been an active investor since 2012 and closed over 100 deals, and the coaching stays grounded in Broward, Miami-Dade, and Palm Beach — not national statistics that don't reflect what's actually happening locally. What comes through on the site is the emphasis on not going it alone. The FAQ section addresses financial support for members who can't otherwise afford mentorship, which is a detail a lot of investor groups skip entirely. Good fit for podcasts covering Latino entrepreneurship, wealth-building, or real estate investing. https://latinreia.com/

title: Insight Tech
author: SpeakCode
description:
Insight Tech is a podcast about building a meaningful career in software engineering.
Each episode explores the decisions, challenges, and lessons that shape life as a developer — from growing beyond the code and stepping into leadership, to navigating teams, communication, career transitions, and the changing role of engineers in the age of AI.
Thoughtful, practical, and made for software engineers who want to better understand not only how technology is built, but how careers in technology are built too.

In this episode, Marco Scurati and Matteo Sangalli, Head of AI, Data & Insights at Plenitude, explain how AI is already part of everyday work, from data management to customer relations and operational activities.

Whether it is an invisible toxin lurking beneath the crisp sheets of a dream island resort, a shocking family betrayal behind closed doors, or a cold-blooded murderer hidden within a tight-knit circle of friends, we dive deep into unsettling cases where the danger is never where you expect it.

Subscribe and join us weekly for immersive storytelling with endings you will never see coming.

description: Two mates, two mics, and absolutely no clue. This is our Plan B—because Plan A can get fucked. We’re not here to inspire, motivate, or give qualified advice. We’re here to talk shit, unpack dumb theories that somehow make way too much sense, and recap weekends that probably went a little too far. Occasionally, we might even stumble into a deep moment—completely by accident. This podcast is our escape plan. A shot at turning banter into a backup career so we can ditch the 9-to-5 and never look back. If you’ve ever wanted out of the system but didn’t want to do it alone—welcome to Plan B.

description:
MAN & ROBOT SOCIETY PRESENTS: THE DREAMING ASTRONAUT
Welcome to the MARS Deep-Space Telemetry Feed.

Following the music the clinical onboard AI conducts a neural interrogation of the Dreamer to decode the meaning behind the dream.

No jargon, no panic just a trusted guide that cuts signal from noise. Made for curious people with zero tech background. Follow for a calmer way to stay safe online.
The signal is hosted by Mike Baca, former CI/HUMINT Marine and National Level Technical Surveillance Countermeasures instructor and current adjunct professor.

title: The William Dean Howells Library
author: William Dean Howells
description: In these unabridged readings of William Dean Howells, the listener is invited into drawing rooms, countinghouses, city streets, and quiet chambers of conscience, where ordinary lives reveal their most extraordinary meanings. Here are stories of ambition, love, money, manners, and moral choice, told with wit, sympathy, and a clear eye for the truths people often hide from themselves. The William Dean Howells Library restores one of America’s great realist voices to the living ear.

title: Gym Owner Beast Show
author: Eric Spiegel
description:
Welcome to the Micro-Gym Retention Secrets Podcast, the show dedicated to helping micro-gym owners build thriving businesses by mastering the one thing that matters most: keeping great members for years, not months.
Each week, you'll discover proven retention strategies, marketing ideas, programming tips, gamification systems, and member experience secrets that help transform ordinary gyms into communities people never want to leave. And brag about you to all their friends and family... making referrals and finding new clients easy peezy. 
 We'll dive into practical lessons, real-world case studies, interviews with successful gym owners, and actionable ideas you can implement immediately.
I'm Eric Spiegel, a fellow gym owner. 
 Years ago, I was a struggling gym owner constantly worrying about where the next member would come from and how to keep them. I spent years studying psychology, branding, customer experience, gamification, and retention while testing hundreds of ideas inside my own gym. Those lessons eventually became the Rockstar Retention Secrets Framework... 
a four-layer system that dramatically improved member retention, built a stronger community, and created a gym business I truly love running.
If you're tired of the constant cycle of chasing new leads and replacing members who quit, this podcast is for you. 
Whether you own a boutique fitness studio, CrossFit gym, personal training studio, or functional fitness gym, you'll learn how to create an unforgettable member experience that builds loyalty, referrals, and long-term success.
Stop chasing members. Start creating fans.
Welcome to the Gym Owner Beast Show

Tune in for candid conversations, fresh perspectives, and an insider look at where place meets performance.

title: Africa Decoded
author: Paul Thomas, MBA-HCM
description:
Welcome to Africa Decoded, the podcast where history meets today’s realities and tomorrow’s possibilities. Hosted by Paul Thomas, MBA-HCM, this podcast explores the untold stories, overlooked facts, and defining issues shaping the African continent.

Each episode examines Africa’s history, governance, economic development, healthcare, natural resources, innovation, geopolitics, and global influence through research, evidence, and thoughtful analysis. We discuss both the challenges and the opportunities facing Africa while highlighting practical solutions and lessons that can inspire meaningful progress.

Whether the topic is colonial history, corruption, international finance, healthcare systems, youth leadership, entrepreneurship, technology, or the future of African development, Africa Decoded is committed to delivering balanced, educational, and engaging conversations that encourage critical thinking.

If you’re passionate about understanding Africa beyond the headlines, this podcast is for you.

Hosted by: Paul Thomas, MBA-HCM

Topics Covered

  • African History
  • Politics & Governance
  • Economics & Development
  • Healthcare & Public Health
  • Leadership
  • Natural Resources
  • International Relations
  • Innovation & Technology
  • Entrepreneurship
  • African Culture & Society
  • Solutions for Sustainable Development

Mission Statement

To educate, inform, and inspire people around the world by presenting evidence-based discussions on Africa’s past, present, and future while promoting solutions that contribute to a stronger, more prosperous continent.

title: Normal People Problems
author: Shufei
description: We are people, not sure about normal - we do have a lot of problems! Just normal people problems! Hoping every conversation leaves you feeling a little less alone!

title: We Are No Alamo
author: We Are No Alamo
description:
We Are No Alamo The Mental Health Podcast (WANA) is dedicated to spreading the word about the importance of mental health awareness and suicide prevention. We believe the only way to shape the future and decrease negative stigma is by having real conversations with people about mental illness (MI) and mental health. We seek to build a community of acceptance, connection, compassion, and hope. Each week this podcast provides a stigma free zone for people to open up and share their stories with others. 
REMEMBER YOU ARE NOT ALONE BECAUSE WE ARE NO ALAMO!

title: The Pragmatic Safety Podcast
author: Julia Dubois
description: The Pragmatic Safety Podcast - where HSE leaders turn insights into safer operations–is a pragmatic and actionable show for leaders in high-risk, regulated industries who are responsible for safety, compliance, quality, and operational performance. Hosted by TenForce COO Julia Dubois, the podcast explores how organizations can build safer, smarter, and more resilient operations by improving the way people, processes, and technology work together on the ground.  Each episode offers practical insights, real-world examples, and candid conversations about the challenges that industrial teams face every day, from incident reporting and audit readiness to permit to work, lockout/tagout, CAPA, and frontline engagement. The goal is not just to discuss what the problems are, but to share actionable ways to solve them in complex operational environments.  Designed for EHS leaders, plant managers, operations executives, quality professionals, and safety-minded decision-makers, the show gives listeners a pragmatic lens on what actually works in the field. Whether the conversation is about strengthening safety culture, reducing manual friction, or exploring the role of AI in EHSQ, every episode is meant to help high-risk organizations operate more safely, efficiently, and intelligently.

title: Before Fajr™
author: Muhammad Moiz Khurram
description:
Most Muslims read the translation and move on. Before Fajr goes deeper verse by verse through classical tafseer, broken down in plain English and turned into action you can take the same day.

No lifeless lectures. No recycled reminders. Each episode takes ayahs of the Quran and asks the hard question: what does this actually demand from you in your money, your habits, your ambition, your heart?

Built for young Muslims who are done with surface-level deen and want the real thing: depth, honesty, and a clear next step.

While the world sleeps, you build. Before Fajr.

title: Conversas inspiradoras para o cresciment
author: Ativo Rentavel
description: Descubra conversas significativas que exploram o desenvolvimento pessoal, a liderança, a inovação, o empreendedorismo e estratégias práticas para alcançar o sucesso a longo prazo. Cada episódio traz insights valiosos, histórias envolventes e ideias práticas, criadas para ajudar os ouvintes a desenvolver confiança, aprimorar a tomada de decisões e descobrir novas oportunidades tanto na vida quanto nos negócios. Seja você quem está iniciando uma nova jornada ou ampliando seus conhecimentos, este podcast oferece inspiração adequada para cada etapa do seu crescimento. O Ativorentavel reúne discussões profundas, perspectivas de especialistas e conteúdo motivacional que estimula o aprendizado contínuo, o pensamento criativo e uma mentalidade positiva para conquistas pessoais e profissionais duradouras.

title: Murder, but Dinner First
author: Matt and Rae
description:
Join us as Matt cooks a delicious meal while Rae serves up a chilling true crime story. Between bites, cocktails, and conversation, you'll hear the twists, secrets, motives, and mysteries behind real-life murder cases—all from the comfort of their dinner table.
From infamous crimes to lesser-known cases that deserve attention, Murder, But Dinner First blends dark storytelling with good food, sharp humor, and the kind of dinner conversation your mother probably warned you about.
So grab a plate, pull up a chair, and remember: the murder can wait...

title: The Marketing Spotlight

description:
Alison Ver Halen is marketer with more than 10 years of experience in content marketing, SEO, branding, and funnel building. In this podcast, she talks with other marketers about marketing: what's going on in the world of marketing these days; what's driving us crazy; dos and don'ts, etc.


So pour yourself a cup of the beverage of your choice (we don't judge) and get ready for a good hang with two awesome marketers.

title: Chronometry of India: The Hindi Calendar & Culture Podcast

Hosted by Auditya Verma, this podcast explores how ancient lunar tracking, star constellations (Nakshatras), and the sun's position intersect to dictate modern Indian festivals, agricultural seasons, and the official national calendar.

This podcast explores the life-changing truths of Scripture, revealing the depth of Christ's saving work, the power of the gospel, and the call to live a life that glorifies God. Each episode is designed to strengthen your faith, deepen your understanding of the Bible, and encourage you to stand firmly on God's unchanging Word. Whether you're a new believer or have walked with Christ for years, these teachings will help you grow in spiritual maturity and find lasting hope in the grace of Jesus Christ. Subscribe, share, and join us as we grow together in the knowledge of God's Word and the grace found only in Christ.

From the ancient battlefields of Greece and Rome to the world wars and beyond, each episode explores the events that shaped nations and changed history. Whether you're a longtime military history fan or just starting your journey, join us as we uncover the facts, separate myths from reality, and discover the lessons of the past—one episode at a time.

title: Behind the Teacher's Desk | Reddit Stories for sleep podcast

description: Ever wonder what teachers really go through behind closed doors? Chalkboard Confessions is where real teacher stories come to life — straight from Reddit, told the way you'd hear them from a friend over coffee. Crazy parents, wild classroom moments, office politics, burnout, drama with admin, the good, the bad, and the absolutely unbelievable. Training Men For Christ puts a biblical emphasis on training men for the local church and the ministry. We see a great need in practical discipleship that cannot only be compensated by head knowledge or a system. We are King James Bible Believers.

The flagship show of the Justice Impact network, it gives a voice to the justice-impacted, humanizes how justice works, and elevates the people fighting to change it.

title: The Road to You
author: Steve
description:
The Road to You is a podcast about what it truly means to live in alignment with who you are — even when the journey is confronting, messy, or unexpectedly beautiful.


Hosted by Steve Mitchell, the show was inspired by his own experiences navigating major life transitions, challenging old identities, and choosing honesty over fear. Through that personal journey, he discovered how powerful it can be when people share the truth of who they are — no matter what their story looks like.


Each episode features real, human conversations with guests who have faced their own turning points: moments where shame, identity, fear, and courage collide. Together, we explore the emotional landscapes behind becoming ourselves, the sacrifices involved, and the freedom that follows.


This podcast exists to remind anyone who is struggling, hiding, or questioning that they’re not alone — and that the road back to your true self is worth walking.


Raw. Honest. Compassionate.

This is the road — the road to you.

title: Results 2.0 Podcast
author: Christopher Lewis
description:
The Results 2.0 Podcast is where fitness meets real life.

Hosted by Chris Lewis, Owner and Trainer of Results 2.0, alongside Anna Norton, a Registered Nurse and Trainer at Results 2.0, this podcast brings together the worlds of fitness, medical insight, and real-world coaching.

Each episode goes beyond workouts and diets to explore what it really takes to build a stronger, healthier, and longer life. We cover fitness, nutrition, mindset, hormone optimization, bloodwork, preventative health, recovery, business, and the daily habits that create lasting results.

You’ll also hear from physicians, industry experts, and members of the Results 2.0 community as they share their knowledge, personal experiences, challenges, and successes. Our goal is to bring you honest conversations, practical advice, and real stories that educate, motivate, and inspire.

Whether you’re just starting your health journey or looking to optimize every area of your life, you’ll walk away with actionable strategies you can apply to your own journey.

At Results 2.0, we believe most people wait until something goes wrong. We believe in getting ahead of it.

Train smarter. Live stronger. Become the 2.0 version of yourself.

Disclaimer: This podcast is for educational and informational purposes only and is not intended to diagnose, treat, or replace personalized medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional regarding your individual health needs.

title: Holiness Foundation
author: Holiness Foundation Ministry
description:
Holiness Foundation (Formerly known as Holiness Preaching Online podcast) is your weekly source for biblically grounded Preaching and spiritual encouragement. Discover how holiness shapes identity, fuels faith, and transforms everyday life. 


Want to upload sermons to us? Click here!
Have a question? Send us an email! 
holinessfoundation@outlook.com


Visit our linktree!


Text Us!


Our Beliefs:

GOD

There is one eternally existing God who has three distinct persons: God the Father, God the Son, and God the Holy Spirit. He is the creator of all that exists, both visible and invisible, and is therefore worthy of all glory and praise.  God is perfect in love, power, holiness, goodness, knowledge, wisdom,  justice, and mercy. He is unchangeable and therefore is the same yesterday, today, and tomorrow.



REVELATION

God has revealed himself to us through his son, Jesus Christ, who is the visible image of the invisible God, the holy scriptures, and through all of creation itself.



MANKIND

Humans, both male and female, were created in God's image for His glory. The first humans, Adam and Eve, were created without sin and appointed as caretakers of the rest of God's creations.



THE FALL

When Adam and Eve chose not to obey God, they ceased to be what they were made to be and became distorted images of God. This caused them to fall out of fellowship with God, and fractured all of creation ever since that time.



SALVATION

Jesus Christ came to reconcile us with God. He lived a life without sin and willingly died on the cross to pay the penalty for our transgressions. God raised him from the dead and now, by grace, offers as a free gift eternal life to all who follow Christ, by faith, as their Lord and Savior. That is why salvation can be found in Christ alone.



THE CHURCH

The Church is meant to be the visible body of Christ, sent into the world to glorify God and proclaim the gospel of Jesus Christ.



RESSURECTION

Jesus Christ is returning one day to judge both the living and the dead and to usher in the fullness of God's kingdom on earth. 










  • The Holy Scriptures are inspired by God and declare His design and plan for mankind.
  • There is only one true God revealed in three persons:  the Father, Son, and  the Holy Ghost (commonly known as the trinity) and in the deity of the Lord Jesus Christ. 
  •   There can be restored fellowship with God through 'Salvation' which is accepting Christ's offer of forgiveness of sin.   
  • After Salvation, believers should live in a Godly lifestyle of holiness, dedicated unto God for His special purpose.   
  • The Baptism of the Holy Ghost, following salvation, empowers the believer for witnessing and effective service.   The initial physical evidence is speaking in tongues.
  •  The church has a mission to fulfill in evangelizing the world with the "Gospel" of Jesus Christ.   
  • Divine healing of the sick is a privilege for Christians today and was provided for in Christ's Atonement for our sins. 
  • Jesus Christ is soon coming back to call his church to Heaven and to judge an unbelieving world for their sins.

title: Halil el hayye Hamas'ın Yeni lideri
author: Yunus Said Destebaşı
description:
Gece yarısı Gazze'den gelen haber, bölgede yeni bir dönemin kapısını araladı.

Hamas içerisinde gerçekleştirilen seçimlerin ardından, hareketin yeni lideri olarak Halil el-Hayye seçildi. Yıllardır örgütün siyasi ve diplomatik kanadında etkin rol üstlenen el-Hayye, şimdi Hamas'ın en kritik dönemlerinden birinde yönetimi devralıyor.

Peki Halil el-Hayye kim? Gazze'de ve uluslararası müzakerelerde öne çıkan isimlerden biri olan el-Hayye, özellikle son yıllarda yürütülen ateşkes ve esir takası görüşmelerinde dikkat çeken aktörler arasında yer aldı.

Uzmanlar, bu liderlik değişiminin Hamas'ın gelecekteki siyasi ve askeri stratejilerini doğrudan etkileyebileceğini değerlendiriyor. Bölgede devam eden gerilim, Gazze'nin geleceği ve olası diplomatik gelişmeler açısından tüm gözler artık Halil el-Hayye'nin atacağı adımlarda olacak.

Ortadoğu'da dengeler yeniden şekilleniyor. Sizce Halil el-Hayye'nin liderliği, bölgede yeni bir sürecin başlangıcı mı olacak?

Gelişmeleri anbean aktarmaya devam edeceğiz.

title: 20 Minute Historian
author: 20-Minute Historian
description: Each episode takes you on a journey through time to explore the moments that shaped civilizations, the people who changed the world, and the conspiracies and unanswered questions that continue to spark debate. From ancient empires and epic battles to unsolved disappearances, political intrigue, secret societies, and historical legends, we separate established facts from speculation while examining the evidence behind history's most fascinating stories.

title: Stephanie Hayes on Healing: Somatic Tools for Nervous System Regulation
author: Stephanie Lee Hayes
description:
Your nervous system isn't broken. It's been doing exactly what it learned to do. 
Stephanie Hayes on Healing is a podcast about nervous system regulation, somatic healing, and trauma-informed wellness for women ready to move beyond survival mode. 
Each episode explores burnout, stress, anxiety, the mind-body connection, and the science behind why we respond the way we do. Along with practical tools and compassionate conversations to help you create a calmer, more connected, and sustainable life.

title: RoCasts
author: Roshan Fernandes
description:
RoCasts is a podcast for the next generation focused on mindset, discipline, self-improvement and personal growth. Through real conversations, honest experiences, and powerful life lessons, each episode explores the habits, challenges, and mentalities that shape people into stronger versions of themselves.


Everyone has a story, and every experience holds value. Whether it’s success, failure, struggle

or growth, this podcast is built around learning from the journeys of others and turning those lessons into practical advice you can apply to your own life.


Hosted by Roshan Fernandes, RoCasts explores inspiring conversations with people from all walks of life. My aim is simple: to help every listener learn something through real conversations with real people, because everyone has a story worth sharing and every journey has lessons to teach. From building confidence and mastering discipline to developing better habits and a stronger mindset, RoCasts is designed to help you think bigger, stay focused and become the best version of yourself – one conversation at a time.

I'm Matt Janaway, CEO of Marketing Labs and a former eCommerce founder who's built, bought and sold multimillion-pound online businesses. Each episode is one of my blog posts, converted into audio so you can listen on the move: SEO, Google Ads, eCommerce and the realities of growing a business online. The voice is AI. The opinions, experience and occasional strong takes are entirely my own.

title: The Heart of the Lie: A Dramatic Podcast
author: M Wright Productions
description:
The Heart of the Lie

A Dramatic Podcast 


"The deepest blue, the sharpest lie. What are you willing to sacrifice to know the truth?"


Prepare yourself for a season immersed in suspense, betrayal, and the lethal collision of obsession and love.


This season follows the perilous journey of a sharp-witted young woman, poised and guarded, who is drawn relentlessly toward a man defined by rugged charm and intensely obsessive eyes. Bathed in a mysterious Blue light, they navigate a world where a brilliant secret—glowing refraction of a brilliant diamond heart—is both a promise of unparalleled fortune and a terrifying threat.


From the dark, churning waves of the Atlantic, where ship’s engines hum with the thrum of forgotten ghosts, to the dazzling, glittering silhouette of the Manhattan skyline, a saga of deep boron-induced magic, stolen horizons, and an impossible weight carried in secret unfolds. It is a story of wealth management, asset protection, and a historical blue wonder that quite frankly, shouldn’t exist.


Prepare for a dramatic confrontation between an enigmatic heiress and a desperate treasure hunter who is moved inland, trading cheap scotch for the hunt. 


Can a series of holding companies and a golden touch bury the truth? Or will a multi-million dollar diamond fraud shatter the empire built on a lie? As the walls are already closing in and family vultures scent blood, a final question emerges: Who is guarding whom, and when the light fades, what truly remains?


New episodes on Tuesdays and Thursdays.

title: Narcissistic Abuse Survivor Autobiography (NASA)
author: Sharlyne Carla
description: This is my testimony about being a narcissistic abuse survivor. I am here to provide inspiration for others who need healing and encouragement to escape their own nightmare. Narcissists can be identified in every facet of our lives from family to coworkers, classmates, and even religious leaders. The emotional and psychological trauma that these individuals can cause by the senseless pain they inflict is nothing short of pure evil. Although there are different types of narcissists and varying degrees of wickedness, I have found that victory and wholeness lies in Jesus Christ alone.

title: Unfiltered with Ash
author: Ashley Bahr
description:
Welcome to Unfiltered with Ash!
Life isn't always polished—and neither are the conversations here.
I'm Ashley, and this is a space where we have honest, unfiltered conversations about faith, family, marriage, motherhood, business, and navigating the everyday moments that shape us. You'll hear real stories, practical encouragement, biblical truth, & conversations that remind you you're not walking through life alone.
Whether you're searching for hope, looking for encouragement, or simply want to listen in on genuine conversations that point back to God's faithfulness, you're in the right place!

title: Amusement Park
author: Amusement Park
description:
Amusement Park Podcast is a show for theme park fans, thrill seekers, and anyone who loves the magic of attractions and immersive entertainment. Each episode explores the stories, history, design, and culture behind amusement parks around the world, featuring engaging conversations, industry insights, ride reviews, and discussions about the latest news. Whether you're a lifelong enthusiast or planning your next park adventure, Amusement Park Podcast brings the excitement of the midway straight to your ears.

Welcome aboard Amusement Park Podcast—your front-row seat to the world of roller coasters, dark rides, themed lands, and unforgettable adventures. From breaking theme park news and attraction reviews to behind-the-scenes stories and passionate discussions, every episode celebrates the thrills, creativity, and nostalgia that make amusement parks so special. Buckle up and join us for the ride!

Amusement Park Podcast celebrates everything theme parks—from iconic roller coasters and classic attractions to industry news, park history, and the creative minds behind unforgettable experiences. Join us each episode as we explore the stories, thrills, and magic that keep fans coming back for another ride.

title: Dissonance DisruptedEmpowering Leaders to navigate from discomfort to dialogue
author: Dissonance Disrupted
description: In a world where DEI seems lost and inclusion is becoming a bad word, we are having real conversations about leadership through the lenses of generational and neurodiversity. We are forging a path toward personal empowerment, conscious leadership, and organizational success. By leveraging evidence-based practices, rooted in neuroscience we can nurture a flourishing workplace culture wherever diversity thrives. Dissonance Disrupted is hosted by Sherri Dockree & Nicki Straza.

title: Unblocked
author: Figure
description:
In industries defined by legacy slog and AI slop, speed, truth, and quality are the ultimate competitive advantages. Welcome to Unblocked, a podcast by Figure. Hosted by Figure CEO Michael Tannenbaum, we dive into the intersections of capital markets, fintech, blockchain, and AI. We interview the innovators and builders tearing down manual bottlenecks to drive cost efficiencies at scale. 
Forget the buzzwords. It’s time to empower your teams, clear the barriers to growth, and finally get unblocked.
